item.title: Say Happy Birthday to our B18 allrounder @B18.SHEEP. 🥳🪅🎊🎉🎁🎂 You’re the rock in our Family, thanks for the fun moments and laughs, for your friendship and loyalty 🫂 @SPEEDY ⚡ @𝙼𝚄𝙳𝙳𝙸 @『B18』MUZAN #pubgmobile #pubgfriends #birthday
